# My World Map

> A free interactive map of visited countries for recording travel history, planning future trips, building a wishlist, and exploring personal travel statistics.

My World Map is a browser-based travel tracker. People can mark countries and territories they have visited, save trips with an optional month and year, distinguish planned travel from completed travel, select a home country, and view travel statistics. Travel data remains in the user's browser unless the user chooses to export it.

## Main page

- [My World Map](https://optyp.github.io/travel-map/): Open the interactive visited-countries map and travel tracker.

## Main features

- Interactive world map of visited countries and territories
- Completed and planned trip tracking
- Travel wishlist and home country
- Year-based map filtering
- Personal travel statistics
- Downloadable share cards without private trip notes
- Light and dark themes

## Privacy

Trip notes and exact personal travel details are not published by the site. Saved travel data is stored locally in the user's browser.
